response:
Subject: Clarification Regarding Machine Vision Sensor Details

Dear [Recipient's Name],

Thank you for your helpful and detailed response.

I believe there may be a misunderstanding regarding our current machine vision system. The device we are using is the FLIR FL3-U3-120S3C-C, and the image sensor on this device is the Sony IMX172, not the e2V sensor (I have attached the technical data for your reference).

Please review the FL3-U3-Technical-Reference PDF file and look at page 18 for the detailed datasheet. For information on Quantum Efficiency, refer to the FL3-U3-EMVA-Imaging PDF file, specifically page 13.

I will study the files and manuals more carefully and keep you informed.

Best regards,  
[Your Name]
